title: Best Hotels in Ubon Ratchathani Thailand (2026)
meta_description: The Ubon Ratchathani hotels that actually help plan the stay: reliable city bases, one newer full-service option, and one deliberate Khong Chiam resort extension backed by official sites.
intro: Ubon hotel choice is mostly about whether you want a practical city base for museums, temples, and food, or whether you are deliberately building an overnight around the Mekong side. The stronger shortlist keeps that split obvious and uses direct hotel sites rather than scrape-era rates and review counts.

items.name: HOP INN Ubon Ratchathani
items.description: The clearest dependable city-budget base when the room is there to support a clean, practical stay near central Ubon rather than become the story itself.
items.location: Chaeng Sanit Road, Nai Mueang, Ubon Ratchathani
highlights: Free Wi-Fi on the direct site
insider_tips: Best if your priority is the city route and not a resort-style pause.
items.current_info: HOP INN's official site still positions the property as a budget hotel in Ubon Ratchathani with direct booking support and city access.

items.name: B2 Ubon Premier Hotel
items.description: A stronger downtown budget-to-mid-range choice if you want a more central city position with predictable facilities and direct-booking support.
items.location: Liang Mueang Road, Nai Mueang, Ubon Ratchathani
highlights: Free Wi-Fi on the direct site
insider_tips: This is a good fit when airport access and downtown convenience matter more than a river or resort setting.
items.current_info: B2's official site still describes the hotel as being in downtown Ubon and about seven minutes from the airport.

items.name: Centara Ubon
items.description: The cleanest newer full-service city-hotel option if you want a larger-format stay tied to shopping access and a newer property profile.
insider_tips: Choose this when the hotel stay itself matters more than a pure budget base.
items.current_info: Centara's official opening material still positions Centara Ubon as the city's newer lifestyle-focused hotel option.

items.name: Tohsang Heritage Khongjiam
items.description: The deliberate Mekong-side overnight choice when the Khong Chiam and Pha Taem side is central enough to justify sleeping away from Ubon city.
insider_tips: Use this only if a Khong Chiam-based sunset or early Pha Taem start is the actual point of the plan.
items.current_info: The current Tohsang Heritage Khongjiam page metadata still presents the property as a Mekong-view retreat near Pha Taem National Park.
